gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/243)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/243)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ مَنْ كَانَ رَفِيقاً فِي أَمْرِهِ نَالَ مَا يُرِيدُ مِنَ النَّاسِ .

en.hubeali: Abu Ali Al Ashary, from Muhammad Bin Hassan, from Al Hassan Bin Al Husayn, from Fuzayl Bin Usman who said,
‘I heard Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘The one who was kind during his lifetime would attain whatever he wanted from the people’.
en.sarwar: 16. Abu Ali al-Ash’ari has narrated from Muhammad ibn Hassan from al-Hassan ibn al-Husayn from Fudayl ibn ‘Uthman who has said the following: “I heard abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) say, ‘Whoever is friendly in his affairs achieves what he wants from people.’”
